summary: TWO_COLUMN importance sampling. LEFT axes with BLUE p=N(0, 1) and ORANGE q=N(1.5, 1) densities + 400 pre-drawn samples from q colored RED (low weight) → YELLOW (high weight) revealed via ValueTracker n_tr. always_redraw dot cloud + live running estimator of E_p[X²]=1. RIGHT has N, estimator, error.
